description_long: This is a large, detached house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a mix of wood and stone exterior finishes. The house has a complex, multi-gabled roof with brown shingles and several dormer windows, giving it a traditional yet rustic appearance. The property includes a driveway with multiple parked cars, a garage, and a landscaped yard with several coniferous trees. A spacious backyard contains a swing set and a large, rectangular sports or play area, possibly a tennis or basketball court. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large picture windows and others smaller and grouped. The main entryway is marked by a covered porch with steps and decorative columns, providing a welcoming focal point.
description: A large, rustic-style house with a multi-gabled roof, wood and stone exterior, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway, garage, trees, and a backyard play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with cars, garage, and landscaped trees along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swing set, large play area, and the house's multi-level structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more of the fenced yard, and the sports/play area prominently.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage entrance, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, decorative columns, and a prominent main door
